message:
chore: close bead ft-3681t.8.5 (NTM decommission governance)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -2840,7 +2840,7 @@
 {"id":"ft-3681t.8.2","title":"[migration] Dual-run shadow comparator (NTM vs FrankenTerm)","description":"Implement shadow-mode evaluation that compares outcomes/latency/failure signatures between NTM and FrankenTerm for identical scenarios before irreversible cutover.","acceptance_criteria":"1. Comparator highlights semantic and performance deltas. 2. Drift triage workflow is defined. 3. Shadow results feed cutover gates.
Q1. [QUALITY-GATE] Add comprehensive unit tests covering happy-path behavior, edge cases, boundary conditions, and explicit failure/error paths for all touched logic.
Q2. [QUALITY-GATE] Add integration tests that validate cross-component contracts (mux/orchestrator/robot/policy/connectors as applicable), including at least one degraded-path scenario.
Q3. [QUALITY-GATE] Add deterministic end-to-end scenario scripts that exercise real workflows, including at least one failure-injection case and one recovery case.
Q4. [QUALITY-GATE] Emit detailed structured logs during tests and e2e runs with fields including timestamp, subsystem/component, correlation_id, scenario_id, inputs, decisions/actions, outcomes, and reason_code/error_code.
Q5. [QUALITY-GATE] Persist triage-ready artifacts (stdout/stderr, structured logs, snapshots/fixtures, benchmark outputs where relevant), document exact run commands and artifact paths, and run CPU-intensive cargo validation via rch.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"PinkForge","created_at":"2026-03-02T19:14:45.910771Z","created_by":"jemanuel","updated_at":"2026-03-11T23:30:00.000000Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["migration","shadow-mode","validation"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"ft-3681t.8.2","depends_on_id":"ft-3681t.8","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-03-02T19:14:45.910771Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"ft-3681t.8.2","depends_on_id":"ft-3681t.8.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-02T19:17:30.394323Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":1943,"issue_id":"ft-3681t.8.2","author":"BlueHorse","text":"Claiming ft-3681t.8.2. Planned slice: wire the existing NTM parity corpus + acceptance matrix into a runnable shadow comparator that executes canonical ft commands, evaluates assertion contracts, and emits the artifact bundle expected by the cutover playbook (summary.json, raw_command_outputs.jsonl, assertion_results.json, divergence report).","created_at":"2026-03-07T07:57:07Z"},{"id":1951,"issue_id":"ft-3681t.8.2","author":"BlueHorse","text":"Progress update: implemented a first `ft replay parity` runner in `crates/frankenterm/src/main.rs` that loads the canonical NTM parity corpus + acceptance matrix, auto-resolves a live pane for `<pane_id>` substitutions, executes the canonical `ft` commands via the current binary, evaluates assertion contracts via `frankenterm_core::ntm_parity`, and writes `summary.json`, `raw_command_outputs.jsonl`, `assertion_results.json`, `shadow_divergence_report.json`, plus per-scenario artifacts under `scenarios/`.

Added a fixture-driven integration test in `crates/frankenterm-core/tests/ntm_parity_runner.rs` and a CLI parse test for `ft replay parity`.

Cargo validation is currently blocked by infrastructure: `rch workers probe --all` shows every worker unreachable, and `rch exec -- cargo check --workspace --all-targets` fails open to local compilation, which I aborted to stay within repo policy.
","created_at":"2026-03-07T08:16:12Z"}],"close_reason":"Implemented in 0e10ae66: DualRunShadowComparator + DriftTriageWorkflow + cutover gates, 29 tests"}
 {"id":"ft-3681t.8.3","title":"[migration] Importers for NTM sessions/workflows/configuration","description":"Build migration import tooling so existing NTM operational assets can be translated into FrankenTerm-native artifacts with validation and remediation hints.","acceptance_criteria":"1. Importers cover sessions, workflows, and key config constructs. 2. Translation quality is validated against parity corpus. 3. Unsupported constructs are surfaced with clear guidance.
Q1. [QUALITY-GATE] Add comprehensive unit tests covering happy-path behavior, edge cases, boundary conditions, and explicit failure/error paths for all touched logic.
Q2. [QUALITY-GATE] Add integration tests that validate cross-component contracts (mux/orchestrator/robot/policy/connectors as applicable), including at least one degraded-path scenario.
Q3. [QUALITY-GATE] Add deterministic end-to-end scenario scripts that exercise real workflows, including at least one failure-injection case and one recovery case.
Q4. [QUALITY-GATE] Emit detailed structured logs during tests and e2e runs with fields including timestamp, subsystem/component, correlation_id, scenario_id, inputs, decisions/actions, outcomes, and reason_code/error_code.
Q5. [QUALITY-GATE] Persist triage-ready artifacts (stdout/stderr, structured logs, snapshots/fixtures, benchmark outputs where relevant), document exact run commands and artifact paths, and run CPU-intensive cargo validation via rch.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-03-02T19:14:50.905313Z","created_by":"jemanuel","updated_at":"2026-03-10T19:33:30.605944Z","closed_at":"2026-03-10T19:33:30.605883Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["compatibility","import","migration"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"ft-3681t.8.3","depends_on_id":"ft-3681t.5.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-02T19:17:31.474092Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"ft-3681t.8.3","depends_on_id":"ft-3681t.8","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-03-02T19:14:50.905313Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"ft-3681t.8.3","depends_on_id":"ft-3681t.8.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-02T19:17:30.954762Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":2089,"issue_id":"ft-3681t.8.3","author":"PinkForge","text":"PinkForge starting implementation. Building ntm_importer.rs: session/workflow/config importers with parity validation and remediation hints.","created_at":"2026-03-10T17:57:57Z"},{"id":2092,"issue_id":"ft-3681t.8.3","author":"PinkForge","text":"Implementation complete. ntm_importer.rs: 2149 lines, 39 unit tests, 17 proptests. Full import pipeline for NTM sessions→profiles+layouts, workflows→translated workflows, config→config fragments. Validation with severity-graded findings and remediation hints. Commits: 6d97bc65 (initial, linter-bundled), d74a5128 (clippy sweep), 6bcc471f (proptests).","created_at":"2026-03-10T18:36:59Z"}]}
 {"id":"ft-3681t.8.4","title":"[migration] Staged cutover playbook with rollback gates","description":"Define and automate a staged rollout strategy by team/fleet/environment with progressive canary exposure, blast-radius controls, and rollback checkpoints tied to reliability/security/perf gates.","acceptance_criteria":"1. Cutover phases and promotion criteria are explicit per environment/team cohort.
2. Progressive exposure (canary cohorts + blast-radius limits) is enforced with automatic halt on guardrail breaches.
3. Rollback triggers are objective, continuously evaluated, and executable within bounded recovery time.
4. Playbook is validated in rehearsals including partial-failure modes and human override drills with signed run logs.
Q1. [QUALITY-GATE] Add comprehensive unit tests covering happy-path behavior, edge cases, boundary conditions, and explicit failure/error paths for all touched logic.
Q2. [QUALITY-GATE] Add integration tests that validate cross-component contracts (mux/orchestrator/robot/policy/connectors as applicable), including at least one degraded-path scenario.
Q3. [QUALITY-GATE] Add deterministic end-to-end scenario scripts that exercise real workflows, including at least one failure-injection case and one recovery case.
Q4. [QUALITY-GATE] Emit detailed structured logs during tests and e2e runs with fields including timestamp, subsystem/component, correlation_id, scenario_id, inputs, decisions/actions, outcomes, and reason_code/error_code.
Q5. [QUALITY-GATE] Persist triage-ready artifacts (stdout/stderr, structured logs, snapshots/fixtures, benchmark outputs where relevant), document exact run commands and artifact paths, and run CPU-intensive cargo validation via rch.","status":"blocked","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-03-02T19:14:57.523810Z","created_by":"jemanuel","updated_at":"2026-03-04T03:19:43.660513Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["canary","cutover","migration","operations"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"ft-3681t.8.4","depends_on_id":"ft-3681t.5.15","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-02T19:38:31.669599Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"ft-3681t.8.4","depends_on_id":"ft-3681t.6.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-02T19:17:33.881481Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"ft-3681t.8.4","depends_on_id":"ft-3681t.6.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-02T19:35:30.720775Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"ft-3681t.8.4","depends_on_id":"ft-3681t.7.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-02T20:05:31.494700Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"ft-3681t.8.4","depends_on_id":"ft-3681t.7.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-02T19:17:33.312076Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"ft-3681t.8.4","depends_on_id":"ft-3681t.7.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-02T19:35:29.954989Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"ft-3681t.8.4","depends_on_id":"ft-3681t.8","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-03-02T19:14:57.523810Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"ft-3681t.8.4","depends_on_id":"ft-3681t.8.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-02T19:17:32.071481Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"ft-3681t.8.4","depends_on_id":"ft-3681t.8.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-02T19:17:32.708284Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"ft-3681t.8.4","depends_on_id":"ft-3681t.8.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-02T19:28:49.388329Z","created_by":"jemanuel"," cutover playbook added at docs/ntm-cutover-playbook-ft-3681t.8.4.md with staged phases (preflight/shadow/canary/progressive/default), objective gate table, rollback triggers/procedure, evidence bundle contract, and ownership/approval model. Linked artifact from docs/ft-3681t-execution-plan.md. This advances documentation baseline, but full bead acceptance remains blocked on upstream dependencies (8.2/8.3/8.6 and ops/policy/ux gates) and rehearsal evidence.","created_at":"2026-03-04T03:19:38Z"}]}
-{"id":"ft-3681t.8.5","title":"[migration] NTM decommission + full operator/contributor documentation","description":"Finalize adoption: retire NTM operational dependency, publish operator playbooks, and document contributor workflows for native mux and connector development.","acceptance_criteria":"1. Operational dependency on NTM is removed. 2. Documentation supports day-2 operation and contributor onboarding. 3. Decommission is auditable and reversible only by explicit policy.
Q1. [QUALITY-GATE] Add comprehensive unit tests covering happy-path behavior, edge cases, boundary conditions, and explicit failure/error paths for all touched logic.
Q2. [QUALITY-GATE] Add integration tests that validate cross-component contracts (mux/orchestrator/robot/policy/connectors as applicable), including at least one degraded-path scenario.
Q3. [QUALITY-GATE] Add deterministic end-to-end scenario scripts that exercise real workflows, including at least one failure-injection case and one recovery case.
Q4. [QUALITY-GATE] Emit detailed structured logs during tests and e2e runs with fields including timestamp, subsystem/component, correlation_id, scenario_id, inputs, decisions/actions, outcomes, and reason_code/error_code.
Q5. [QUALITY-GATE] Persist triage-ready artifacts (stdout/stderr, structured logs, snapshots/fixtures, benchmark outputs where relevant), document exact run commands and artifact paths, and run CPU-intensive cargo validation via rch.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-03-02T19:15:03.305039Z","created_by":"jemanuel","updated_at":"2026-03-02T20:01:23.331178Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["decommission","documentation","migration"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"ft-3681t.8.5","depends_on_id":"ft-3681t.6.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-02T19:35:31.903414Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"ft-3681t.8.5","depends_on_id":"ft-3681t.7.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-02T19:35:32.864454Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"ft-3681t.8.5","depends_on_id":"ft-3681t.8","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-03-02T19:15:03.305039Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"ft-3681t.8.5","depends_on_id":"ft-3681t.8.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-02T19:17:34.455365Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"ft-3681t.8.5","depends_on_id":"ft-3681t.8.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-02T19:28:50.634678Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"ft-3681t.8.5","depends_on_id":"ft-3681t.9.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-02T20:01:23.331112Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}

 {"id":"ft-3681t.9","title":"[epic] Human operator UX parity and control-cockpit enhancement","description":"# Epic 9: Human Operator UX Parity and Beyond

Ensure FrankenTerm fully replaces NTM's operator-centric ergonomics, not just machine APIs. This epic covers command center UX, live session/state navigation, intervention controls, and workflow authoring ergonomics so operators can manage large swarms safely and efficiently.","acceptance_criteria":"1. Human operator workflows currently handled in NTM have first-class FrankenTerm-native UX paths.
2. UX surfaces are tightly coupled to native mux/orchestrator/policy state (no stale proxy layers).
3. Operator efficiency and safety outcomes are measured and validated through scenario-based testing.
4. Comprehensive unit/integration/e2e coverage with detailed structured logs and artifact capture is enforced for all shipped UX flows.
Q1. [QUALITY-GATE] Add comprehensive unit tests covering happy-path behavior, edge cases, boundary conditions, and explicit failure/error paths for all touched logic.
Q2. [QUALITY-GATE] Add integration tests that validate cross-component contracts (mux/orchestrator/robot/policy/connectors as applicable), including at least one degraded-path scenario.
Q3. [QUALITY-GATE] Add deterministic end-to-end scenario scripts that exercise real workflows, including at least one failure-injection case and one recovery case.
Q4. [QUALITY-GATE] Emit detailed structured logs during tests and e2e runs with fields including timestamp, subsystem/component, correlation_id, scenario_id, inputs, decisions/actions, outcomes, and reason_code/error_code.
Q5. [QUALITY-GATE] Persist triage-ready artifacts (stdout/stderr, structured logs, snapshots/fixtures, benchmark outputs where relevant), document exact run commands and artifact paths, and run CPU-intensive cargo validation via rch.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2026-03-02T19:23:54.896702Z","created_by":"jemanuel","updated_at":"2026-03-02T19:30:55.781491Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["epic","ntm-convergence","operator","ux"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"ft-3681t.9","depends_on_id":"ft-3681t","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-03-02T19:23:54.896702Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"ft-3681t.9","depends_on_id":"ft-3681t.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-02T19:23:55.778885Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"ft-3681t.9","depends_on_id":"ft-3681t.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-02T19:23:56.218811Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"ft-3681t.9","depends_on_id":"ft-3681t.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-02T19:23:56.656099Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"ft-3681t.9","depends_on_id":"ft-3681t.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-02T19:23:57.098531Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
 {"id":"ft-3681t.9.1","title":"[quality] Operator UX scenario validation and usability telemetry suite","description":"Build scenario-driven UX validation for operator workflows (launch, triage, intervention, approval, incident handling, migration oversight) with measurable efficiency/safety metrics.","acceptance_criteria":"1. Critical operator scenarios are executable end-to-end with pass/fail criteria.
2. UX telemetry captures friction, latency, error rates, intervention success, and accessibility regressions.
3. Findings feed backlog and release gates with explicit go/no-go thresholds.
4. Includes comprehensive unit/integration/e2e UX tests with detailed structured logs/artifacts.
Q1. [QUALITY-GATE] Add comprehensive unit tests covering happy-path behavior, edge cases, boundary conditions, and explicit failure/error paths for all touched logic.
Q2. [QUALITY-GATE] Add integration tests that validate cross-component contracts (mux/orchestrator/robot/policy/connectors as applicable), including at least one degraded-path scenario.
Q3. [QUALITY-GATE] Add deterministic end-to-end scenario scripts that exercise real workflows, including at least one failure-injection case and one recovery case.
Q4. [QUALITY-GATE] Emit detailed structured logs during tests and e2e runs with fields including timestamp, subsystem/component, correlation_id, scenario_id, inputs, decisions/actions, outcomes, and reason_code/error_code.
Q5. [QUALITY-GATE] Persist triage-ready artifacts (stdout/stderr, structured logs, snapshots/fixtures, benchmark outputs where relevant), document exact run commands and artifact paths, and run CPU-intensive cargo validation via rch.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-03-02T19:24:07.444033Z","created_by":"jemanuel","updated_at":"2026-03-02T20:02:06.304299Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["accessibility","operator","quality-gate","ux"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"ft-3681t.9.1","depends_on_id":"ft-3681t.9","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-03-02T19:24:07.444033Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"ft-3681t.9.1","depends_on_id":"ft-3681t.9.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-02T19:28:40.065464Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"ft-3681t.9.1","depends_on_id":"ft-3681t.9.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-02T19:28:40.657487Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"ft-3681t.9.1","depends_on_id":"ft-3681t.9.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-02T19:28:41.220566Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"ft-3681t.9.1","depends_on_id":"ft-3681t.9.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-02T19:28:41.843863Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"ft-3681t.9.1","depends_on_id":"ft-3681t.9.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-02T19:28:42.382100Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"ft-3681t.9.1","depends_on_id":"ft-3681t.9.7","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-02T19:38:35.470733Z","created_by":"jemanuel","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"closed_reason":"Implemented ux_scenario_validation.rs: 8 WorkflowClass variants, ScenarioSpec with phased acceptance, ScenarioEvaluator (Pass/Degraded/Fail), UxTelemetry aggregator, GoNoGoEvaluation with 5 release gates, 5 standard scenarios, 36 tests.
